title: oenothera laciniata subsp. pubescens
intro: Oenothera laciniata subsp. pubescens, also known as the fragrant evening primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and other minor ailments. The health benefits of Oenothera laciniata subsp. pubescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
